title: Conveyor Eval Metric
description: A single metric emitted by an eval suite into eval/scorecards/inputs/. Aggregated by conveyor.eval_scorecard@1. The emitting suite decides `status`; a `blocking` metric with status `blocking` fails the scorecard --gate.

ci.description: Optional exact confidence interval [p_low, p_high] from Conveyor.Statistics.clopper_pearson_interval/3.
